failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'token' in {'bookings': [{'added_by': '', 'age_group': '15-18', 'assigned_educator_id': 'b79a34e0-6adc-4dab-be3d-35ad74be2b33', 'assigned_educator_name': 'Vusha Bihani', ...}, {'added_by': '', 'age_group': '', 'assigned_educator_id': 'a0c8633f-1c51-4502-ad2f-9e0880d76d65', 'assigned_educator_name': 'Krish Jain', ...}, {'added_by': '', 'age_group': '6-9', 'assigned_educator_id': 'a0c8633f-1c51-4502-ad2f-9e0880d76d65', 'assigned_educator_name': 'Krish Jain', ...}, {'added_by': '', 'age_group': '6-9', 'assigned_educator_id': '7a0c86fa-436e-496d-850b-d4a1b020c632', 'assigned_educator_name': 'Vibhushan Shreyaan', ...}, {'added_by': '', 'age_group': '6-9', 'assigned_to': '', 'city': 'Mumbai', ...}, {'added_by': '', 'age_group': '10-14', 'assigned_to': '', 'city': '', ...}, ...], 'email': 'clonefutura@gmail.com', 'is_registered': True, 'name': 'Shreshth', ...}
